name: mb-smart-product-wiki
description: Ministry Brands Smart Product Wiki. Three skills for product teams: the Knowledgebase Maker (builds a complete two-page product knowledgebase, a Knowledge Base Overview dashboard plus a deep Knowledgebase reference, from a guided interview and live product walkthrough; both are paste-ready markdown), the Knowledgebase Assistant (your day-to-day companion for querying, updating, auditing, and prepping your knowledgebase before any task; runs a structural audit automatically on every load), and the Persona Maker (creates data-informed user personas with gap analysis and a concrete validation plan). The Maker produces markdown that the user then pastes into their own Confluence page, duplicated from the MB Design Ops reference template. The plugin itself does not save or publish anything to Confluence automatically.
